query: SELECT e.id, e.processoId, LEFT(e.tesePrincipal, 200) as tese, LEFT(e.fundamentacaoLegal, 200) as fundamentacao, LEFT(e.jurisprudenciaCitada, 200) as jurisprudencia FROM estrategias e ORDER BY e.id;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3Xc9RJjwPAzqyUN.e36368bedae0 --database 4imSnKhwnzycXmSWcGeMqe --execute SELECT e.id, e.processoId, LEFT(e.tesePrincipal, 200) as tese, LEFT(e.fundamentacaoLegal, 200) as fundamentacao, LEFT(e.jurisprudenciaCitada, 200) as jurisprudencia FROM estrategias e ORDER BY e.id;
